---
title: DaplaNytt-møte 18.06.2026
categories:
  - daplanytt
author:
  - name: Øyvind Bruer-Skarsbø
    affiliation:
      - name: Seksjon for dataplattform (724)
        email: obr@ssb.no
date: "06/18/2026"
date-modified: "06/18/2026"
image: ../../../images/dapla-long.png
draft: false
lightbox: true
---

DaplaNytt fra juni 2026 ble avholdt som Teams-møte 18. juni 2026. [Se opptaket her](https://engage.cloud.microsoft/main/org/ssb.no/threads/eyJfdHlwZSI6IlRocmVhZCIsImlkIjoiMzkwNTkyMjUxNDM2MjM2OCJ9?trk_copy_link=V2).

Slides [finner du her](https://ideal-guide-egkqq6z.pages.github.io/daplanytt-jun26.html#/title-slide).
